/a.d.ts(13,21): error TS2451: Cannot redeclare block-scoped variable 'ns'.
/b.d.ts(2,18): error TS2451: Cannot redeclare block-scoped variable 'ns'.


==== /a.d.ts (1 errors) ====
    declare module "dep" {
        type Arr = string[];
        interface DepModule {
            (): void;
            readonly data: Arr;
        }
        const dep: DepModule;
        export = dep;
    }
    
    declare module "wrapper" {
        import * as dep from "dep";
        export { dep as ns };
                        ~~
!!! error TS2451: Cannot redeclare block-scoped variable 'ns'.
!!! related TS6203 /b.d.ts:2:18: 'ns' was also declared here.
    }
    
==== /b.d.ts (1 errors) ====
    declare module "wrapper" {
        export const ns: number;
                     ~~
!!! error TS2451: Cannot redeclare block-scoped variable 'ns'.
!!! related TS6203 /a.d.ts:13:21: 'ns' was also declared here.
    }
    
==== /main.ts (0 errors) ====
    import * as w from "wrapper";
